role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and fire patterns consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Ponderosa, Aspen) and undergrowth.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road width, markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Assessed camera generation artifacts and road maintenance styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the United States by leveraging strong botanical and landscape evidence (Ponderosa pine, fire patterns) and meta-evidence (camera artifacts). The agents stayed strictly within their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of pines, granite, and fire damage match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification aligns with visual cues of the trees.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the United States.
